ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the store */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date of store inspection */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the store based on customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the department belongs to */,
  "dept_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "dept_type" TEXT /* Type of the department (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store making the sales */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department making the sales */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Weekly sales amount */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sales occurred during a holiday week */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order if the sale is part of a larger order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional event */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the promotion */,
  "expected_sales_increase" REAL /* Expected increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  "actual_sales_increase" REAL /* Actual increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale from the sales table */,
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion from the promotions table */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Specific discount applied to the sale during the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the week */,
  "total_holidays" INTEGER /* Number of holidays in that week */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions for the week */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_sales_summary_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Last date the customer made a purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where feedback was given */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who served the customer */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of any follow-up actions taken based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is kept */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "date_last_restocked" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was restocked */,
  "expected_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date for the next restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer returning the product */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales target */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store associated with the target */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the target */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Sales target amount to be achieved */,
  "target_period" TEXT /* Period for which the target is set */,
  "achievement_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the target achieved */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Rewards or bonuses for achieving the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)
